page_metadata.biocontainers__summary: Web application for exploration of large scale scrna-seq datasets
page_metadata.biotools__summary: cellxgene (pronounced "cell-by-gene") is an interactive data explorer for single-cell transcriptomics datasets, such as those coming from the Human Cell Atlas.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: cellxgene (pronounced "cell-by-gene") is an interactive data explorer for single-cell transcriptomics datasets, such as those coming from the Human Cell Atlas.
